title: Next.js
subTitle: App Router SSR/CSR for SEO and performance
overviewContent: I build production frontends with Next.js (App Router), balancing server-side rendering for SEO with client-side interactivity for a responsive UX. Across the H & H Lawyers website rebuild, this portfolio, and GroundedDoc I've used server components, route-level metadata, dynamic routing, and hybrid SSR/CSR data fetching, with a focus on clean, scalable folder structures and maintainable, type-safe components.
